data.title: Update CLAUDE.md for harvest-worktree.sh and attestation workflow
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Update CLAUDE.md to reference harvest-worktree.sh in the worktree lifecycle, multi-agent orchestration, and quick reference sections. Add harvest-worktree.sh to the command table. Document the attestation trust chain.

### Files to modify
- CLAUDE.md

### TDD exemption
Criterion 3: static assets only — non-executable instruction file. CLAUDE.md changes routed through dso:doc-writer with bloat-review per rule 79d9-f97a.

### Special handling
doc_target: CLAUDE.md
bloat_review_required: true
max_tokens_budget: 12000

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md references harvest-worktree.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'harvest-worktree' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md documents attestation trust chain
  Verify: grep -q 'attest' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] check-referential-integrity passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/check-referential-integrity.sh
